tibblify 0.3.1.9002

AGENTS.md

Source: AGENTS.md

General

  • When running R from the console, use --quiet --vanilla.
  • Always run air format . after generating code.
  • After adding or changing functions, update their documentation per @.github/skills/document/SKILL.md .

Skills

Load skills from @.github/skills when the user triggers them.

Trigger Path
tag tests with issues @.github/skills/tag-tests-with-issues/SKILL.md
document functions @.github/skills/document/SKILL.md

Testing

  • Tests for R/{name}.R go in tests/testthat/test-{name}.R.
  • devtools::test(reporter = "check") runs all tests; devtools::test(filter = "name", reporter = "check") runs tests for one file.
  • Testing functions automatically load code; you don’t need to.
  • All new code should have an accompanying test. Place new tests next to similar existing tests.

Coverage

Goal: 100% file-level test coverage. After editing a file, verify coverage:

covr_res <- devtools:::test_coverage_active_file("R/file_name.R")
which(purrr::map_int(covr_res, "value") == 0)

Excluded from coverage requirements: - @R/aaa-shared_params.R - @R/tibblify-package.R - Files matching R/import-standalone-*.R

On this page

Developed by Jon Harmon, Maximilian Girlich.
